name: Joel Stains Pilli
headline: Your headline (e.g., Senior Product Manager · B2B SaaS)
summary: After leading operations and working across different industries, I’ve learned that successful projects really come down to clear communication and the ability to adapt when things change. I’m comfortable connecting big-picture ideas to the day-to-day work, turning messy goals into plans that teams can actually follow. Whether it’s a nonprofit initiative or an ad campaign, I focus on delivering results that make sense and move things forward. I’m looking to bring that same practical, organized approach to a team that values thoughtful execution.
bio: After leading operations and working across different industries for 5+ years, I’ve learned that successful projects really come down to clear communication and the ability to adapt when things change. I’m comfortable connecting big-picture ideas to the day-to-day work, turning messy goals into plans that teams can actually follow.
Whether it’s a nonprofit initiative or an ad campaign, I focus on delivering results that make sense and move things forward.
I’m looking to bring that same practical, organized approach to a team that values thoughtful execution.
lookingFor: Examples: Senior roles in product, engineering leadership, consulting projects, advisory.

experience.title: Research Assistant
highlights: Led data-driven projects by analyzing 500+ datasets and developing automated dashboards, improving KPI visibility and accelerating decision-making.
Partnered with cross-functional stakeholders to gather requirements, define problem statements, and deliver analytics and application solutions aligned with business objectives.
Identified inefficiencies and implemented workflow improvements, increasing operational productivity and reducing reporting cycle time.
Applied Agile and project management principles to manage concurrent initiatives, enhance user experience, and support system implementation, training, and adoption.

experience.title: Instructional Student Assistant
highlights: Managed multiple concurrent academic projects by applying Agile principles, milestone tracking, and stakeholder coordination to ensure timely and effective delivery.
Collaborated with faculty to develop data-driven instructional materials and optimize workflows, improving curriculum outcomes and operational efficiency.
Acted as a key liaison between faculty and students, leading regular check-ins, resolving blockers, and maintaining clear communication to align deliverables.
Leveraged training, data analysis, and process improvement skills to enhance user adoption of enterprise tools and support informed decision-making in a collaborative, deadline-driven environment.

experience.title: Operations Manager
highlights: Directed end-to-end project execution across multiple departments, aligning initiatives with organizational goals, timelines, and performance metrics.
Developed data-driven strategies, managed budgets and resources, and implemented process improvements to optimize delivery efficiency and cost effectiveness.
Led cross-functional teams through Agile project cycles, driving collaboration, accountability, and consistent program execution.
Managed stakeholder communication, reporting, and vendor coordination to ensure alignment, transparency, and successful project outcomes.

experience.title: Sr HR Assistant
highlights: Led cross-functional HR initiatives across payroll, benefits, onboarding, and compliance, ensuring alignment with organizational goals and efficient delivery.
Drove process improvements and implemented tracking systems to streamline workflows, reduce response times, and enhance overall service efficiency.
Acted as a key stakeholder liaison, managing escalations, resolving complex issues, and maintaining clear communication while ensuring regulatory compliance.
Applied project management principles to prioritize tasks, manage dependencies, and consistently deliver high-quality outcomes in a fast-paced environment.

experience.title: Ad Ops Specialist
highlights: Managed end-to-end digital advertising projects, coordinating with cross-functional teams and clients to optimize campaign performance, timelines, and revenue outcomes.
Leveraged data analytics tools (Google Analytics, Ad Manager) to monitor KPIs, identify trends, and drive data-informed decisions that improved targeting, engagement, and ROI.
Acted as a key stakeholder liaison, ensuring alignment through proactive communication, issue resolution, and structured reporting across campaign lifecycles.
Applied project management and Agile principles to prioritize tasks, maintain documentation, and implement continuous improvements, while enabling stakeholder training and adoption of best practices.

experience.title: Ad Operations Intern
highlights: Supported end-to-end campaign execution and monitoring by coordinating with internal teams and ensuring timely delivery across digital advertising platforms.
Utilized data analytics tools (Google Analytics, Excel) to track performance metrics, generate reports, and identify discrepancies for improved campaign outcomes.
Contributed to process improvements and documentation while applying project coordination principles to enhance workflow efficiency and support team objectives.
